rows.command: PYTHONPATH=src uv run --no-sync python -c 'from rlrmp.runtime.checkpoint_fork_gate import register_rlrmp_training_methods; register_rlrmp_training_methods(); from rlrmp.train.cs_nominal_gru import build_parser, build_run_spec_execution_context, _json_dumps, _run_full_training_from_context; parser = build_parser(); args = parser.parse_args(["--run-spec", "results/c6c5997/runs/flat_3e-5.json", "--resume"]); context = build_run_spec_execution_context(args, parser=parser); print(_json_dumps(_run_full_training_from_context(context)), end="")'
